title: IoT Measurement v1
description: One sensor reading published by a gateway or the simulator. Carries exactly one sensorType + value + unit per message (not a batch); see docs/17_ERD_TELEMETRY_AUTOMATION_WORK_ORDERS.md §3.2.

messageId.description: Producer-assigned unique id. Dedupe key: a redelivered MQTT message with the same messageId MUST NOT create a second row.

deviceId.description: Opaque public id of the device that produced the reading.

plotId.description: Opaque public id of the plot the reading belongs to. Null for farm-level devices not bound to a single plot.

sensorType.description: Kind of measurement. light and ph are optional hardware per docs/01_SCOPE_AND_NON_GOALS.md.

value.description: Numeric reading. Range is validated per sensorType by the ingest use case, not by this contract.

unit.description: Measurement unit. MUST match sensorType (docs/07_DATA_MODEL_GUIDE.md); that cross-field rule is enforced at ingest, not in this schema.

measuredAt.description: When the sensor took the reading (RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 UTC).

quality.description: Ingest quality. Only 'valid' rows feed /latest, policy decisions, or automation; suspect/invalid rows are quarantined evidence, never silently dropped (AGENTS.md §8).

signature.description: Optional integrity proof for the reading.
